name: claude-private-fm
description: A local-first Claude FM PWA with pluggable music, voice, weather, and calendar adapters.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/server/app.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/modules/main.js && npm run build:liquid-nav
scripts.android:sync: npm run android:patch-node-plugin && npm run android:install-node-api && npm run android:prepare-node-api && cap sync android && npm run android:patch-node-plugin && npm run android:prepare-node-api
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run check && npm run android:patch-node-plugin && npm run android:install-node-api && npm run android:prepare-node-api && cap sync android && npm run android:patch-node-plugin && npm run android:prepare-node-api && cd android && gradle.bat assembleDebug
